items.summary: Redesign the Hero section in frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx with a fresh layout. Replace the current side-by-side arrangement with a full-width, visually striking design: use a large background-style hero image with an overlay, center-aligned or asymmetric headline and subtext, updated CTA button placement, and retain the stat badges (24/7, 100%, Toledo) and DODD accreditation badge in the new layout. The new hero image (hero-redesign.dim_1440x900.png) should be rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated.
